name: Chicken Stuffing-Hashwey (Lebanese)
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground lamb with margarine.
2. Stir in rice and allow it to absorb some of the liquid.
3. Add salt, cinnamon, black pepper, and chicken broth. Cover and cook for 20 minutes or more until the rice is tender.
4. Add chicken pieces and slivered almonds.
